title: Decadent Canadian Broccoli Bowl
description: A romantic, sour‑creamy flexitarian bowl that showcases fresh broccoli deglazed with apple cider vinegar and finished in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium and add the olive oil.
Add the minced shallot and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in grated ginger and diced carrot, cook for 2 minutes.
Add broccoli florets and red bell pepper, cook, stirring, until vegetables are bright green and just tender, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together apple cider vinegar, Dijon mustard, Greek yogurt, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables, stirring to coat evenly.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 3 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Transfer the bowl of broccoli and sauce to a Korean brass bowl for serving.
Garnish with a sprinkle of chopped fresh parsley, if desired, and serve warm.
